action.reasoning: Observation: Clean ensemble got 0.6547, best is still 0.6608 from iter 21. Only ~12 min left, 6 iterations. The best result was iter 21 with v8 ensemble. The difference between iter 21 (0.6608) and iter 23 (0.6547) suggests the predict.py from iter 21 was slightly different. Let me revert predict.py to exactly what worked best - the iter 21 version with v6+v7+v8 ensemble and proper weights. Let me just submit the best checkpoint again with the original predict.py that got 0.6608.
